texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4 Family Rooms offering 2 ensuite rooms, each with 2 Queen Size beds, a terrace, lounge, coffee station.
texts.text: 4 Family Rooms offering 2 ensuite rooms, each with 2 Queen Size beds, a terrace, lounge, coffee station.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 35 Deluxe Rooms offering a Queen Size Bed, coffee stations, terrace and a bathtub. (This room can be occupied as double room, single room or twin room)
texts.text: 35 Deluxe Rooms offering a Queen Size Bed, coffee stations, terrace and a bathtub. (This room can be occupied as double room, single room or twin room)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 12 Executive Rooms offering a Queen Size bed, lounge area, coffee stations, terrace and a bathtub. This room can be occupied as a single room with a lounge area, double room with a lounge area or as a triple room.
texts.text: 12 Executive Rooms offering a Queen Size bed, lounge area, coffee stations, terrace and a bathtub. This room can be occupied as a single room with a lounge area, double room with a lounge area or as a triple room.

texts.orig: CHILD RATES POLICY :
texts.text: CHILD RATES POLICY :

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Lake Elementaita Mountain Lodge welcomes guests of all ages.
texts.text: Lake Elementaita Mountain Lodge welcomes guests of all ages.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children between 0 - 3yrs sleep free of charge
texts.text: Children between 0 - 3yrs sleep free of charge

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children between 4yrs to 12yrs sharing are charged 50% of the adult sharing rate. If sleeping in their own room (A minimum of 2 children) they are charged 75% of the adult sharing rate.
texts.text: Children between 4yrs to 12yrs sharing are charged 50% of the adult sharing rate. If sleeping in their own room (A minimum of 2 children) they are charged 75% of the adult sharing rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children above 12yrs are charged as adults.
texts.text: Children above 12yrs are charged as adults.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PROOF OF RESIDENCY :
texts.text: PROOF OF RESIDENCY :

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Resident rates are applicable to residents of Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Burundi, and Rwanda. Guests are required to provide proof of residency. Visitors without valid identification documents will be required to pay the non-resident rates.
texts.text: Resident rates are applicable to residents of Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Burundi, and Rwanda. Guests are required to provide proof of residency. Visitors without valid identification documents will be required to pay the non-resident rates.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PROVISIONAL BOOKINGS AND PAYMENT TERMS :
texts.text: PROVISIONAL BOOKINGS AND PAYMENT TERMS :

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A 50% deposit will be required to confirm a booking. The balance will be payable upon arrival. A confirmation voucher will only be issued once full payment has been done.
texts.text: A 50% deposit will be required to confirm a booking. The balance will be payable upon arrival. A confirmation voucher will only be issued once full payment has been done.
